rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for port-based assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE contracts are placed in valid AADL scopes relative to the component type or implementation.
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions.
Validate scalar type names (int, real, bool) in const and eq declarations to avoid resolution errors.
Align assumed types with actual expression types in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type contracts should avoid implementation-specific subcomponent paths.
Constants and equations in AGREE should use valid AADL scalar types (int, real, bool).
anti_patterns: Do not place port-based assumptions or guarantees in implementation scopes unless they are bindings.
Avoid using opaque Boolean data in numeric range comparisons; use exact Boolean expressions only when appropriate.
